title: Kick off I&A Cycle 2.1R
description:
## Objective
Marker task. Closing this task closes iteration 2.1 and unblocks iteration 2.1R (which contains the actual reflection work).

## Implementation
1. Verify all sibling tasks under parent 1x7 are closed: `tk list --parent 1x7`.
2. Close this task — iteration 2.1 epic should auto-close (or close it manually with `tk close 1x7`).
3. Next iteration (2.1R) becomes ready.

## Tests
`tk next` returns the first task of iteration 2.1R after closing this task.
